'''鈭歠-y-w-dh''' ('''kafaywedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ruggedize|ruggedize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-y-w-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ruggedize|ruggedize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-y-w-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kafaywedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifaywedhoko|thifaywedhoko]] || [[word:jifaywedhoko|jifaywedhoko]] || [[word:shifaywedhoko|shifaywedhoko]] || [[word:kifaywedhoko|kifaywedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufaywedhoko|thuthufaywedhoko]] || [[word:jujufaywedhoko|jujufaywedhoko]] || [[word:shushufaywedhoko|shushufaywedhoko]] || [[word:kukufaywedhoko|kukufaywedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufaywedhoko|thufaywedhoko]] || [[word:jufaywedhoko|jufaywedhoko]] || [[word:shufaywedhoko|shufaywedhoko]] || [[word:kufaywedhoko|kufaywedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofaywedhoko|thofaywedhoko]] || [[word:jofaywedhoko|jofaywedhoko]] || [[word:shofaywedhoko|shofaywedhoko]] || [[word:kofaywedhoko|kofaywedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙faywedhoko|th忙faywedhoko]] || [[word:j忙faywedhoko|j忙faywedhoko]] || [[word:sh忙faywedhoko|sh忙faywedhoko]] || [[word:k忙faywedhoko|k忙faywedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafaywedhoko|thathafaywedhoko]] || [[word:jajafaywedhoko|jajafaywedhoko]] || [[word:shashafaywedhoko|shashafaywedhoko]] || [[word:kakafaywedhoko|kakafaywedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafaywedhoko|thafaywedhoko]] || [[word:jafaywedhoko|jafaywedhoko]] || [[word:shafaywedhoko|shafaywedhoko]] || [[word:kafaywedhoko|kafaywedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafaywedhoko|thafaywedhoko]] || [[word:jafaywedhoko|jafaywedhoko]] || [[word:shafaywedhoko|shafaywedhoko]] || [[word:kafaywedhoko|kafaywedhoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
